name: Voodoo Doll
descs:
Turn Start: deal 3 fixed Envy Affinity damage to all enemies.

Inflict 1 [ResultReduction] to enemies with 33% or less HP.

Turn Start: deal <style="upgradeHighlight">4 fixed Envy Affinity damage</style> to all enemies.

Inflict 1 [ResultReduction] to enemies with <style="upgradeHighlight">50% or less HP</style>.

Turn Start: deal <style="upgradeHighlight">5 fixed Envy Affinity damage</style> to all enemies.

<style="upgradeHighlight">Inflict 2 [ResultReduction]</style> to enemies with 50% or less HP.
